The '''Vunakians''' were [[Human/Legends|Humans]] who showed a typical apparel: a ritual scar pattern in their forehead and their cheeks, with a completely clean-shaven head. They had numerous castes, which could be determined by the geometric symbols that were seen in the scars. These symbols were obtained during the [[Scarification Ceremony]], where the scars were made without using any kind of pain inhibition.

Their language was [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]]. The [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Kohn Doil]] was a Vunakian.
